articles.title: Crypto Investors Ready To Deploy $25,000,000,000 Once Bottom Is In, According to Quant Analyst
articles.description: On-chain insights platform CryptoQuant CEO Ki Young Ju says crypto investors did not leave the market despite this year’s downturn. According to Ju, the current dip that sent Bitcoin (BTC) plunging below $20,000 from an all-time high of nearly $70,000 can be considered the crypto market’s first recession. “The first recession for crypto markets.
